case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. CHRISTIAN REYNALDO PEREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, CHRISTIAN REYNALDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, CHRISTIAN REYNALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, CHRISTIAN REYNALDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED JUL-31-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, CHRISTIAN REYNALDO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE AT APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN REYNALDO PEREZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
